'''Wertsnik''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] soldier and a member of [[Mynnic]]'s band of adventurers around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. He was a veteran of many battles.

==Biography==
[[File:Wertsnik.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Undead incarnation of Wertsnik.]]
Wertsnik was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] soldier and a member of [[Mynnic]]'s band of adventurers around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. He was a veteran of many battles.<ref name="SWGamer" /> Sometime following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Wertsnik was present on the planet [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] when an [[Blackwing virus outbreak on Dathomir|accident]] took place in the [[Imperial Research and Prison Facility]]. Wertsnik fell victim to the [[Imperial bioweapons Project I71A|Blackwing virus]], and turned into an [[Zombie/Legends|undead]] manifestation. His undead body was controlled by the virus and kept walking around in the [[Quarantine Zone (Dathomir)|Quarantine Zone]] until it was destroyed by a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]].<ref name="SWG:UB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Wertsnik was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:UB" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Wertsnik was added to the game with the "[[W:c:swg:Game Update 14|Game Update 14]]," released on [[October 12]], [[2009]].<ref name="SonyForumsCite-Game Update 14: Death Troopers">{{SonyForumsCite|url=swg/posts/list.m?topic_id=1008376|text=Game Update 14: Death Troopers}}</ref> Hee was one of the [[:w:c:swg:Undead Boss|Undead boss enemies]] in the Quarantine Zone that players have to kill to complete a [[:w:c:swg:Collection|collection]].<ref name="SWG:UB" />
